hero.title-1: A little whisper each day — like from a
hero.title-3: who remembers and cares about you

copy.c-1: A short message to warm your heart and lift your spirit.
copy.c-2: Every evening, at the same time.

hero.button: Let my first whisper find me tonight
hero.CTA: Your first whisper arrives this evening

how-it-works.title: As simple as a deep breath

step-1.title: Sign up in moments
step-1.description: Just share your phone number — that’s all. A simple form, ready in a heartbeat

step-2.title: Your whisper, every evening
step-2.description: Each night, at the same time, a message created by a poet just for you arrives.

step-3.title: Enjoy your moment
step-3.description: Read it slowly, smile, save it — or share it with someone you love. It’s your pause in the day.

how-it-works.mini-CTA: So simple — your first whisper can arrive this very evening
how-it-works.button: Let my first whisper find me

reassurance-box.title: Your phone number stays safe
reassurance-box.description: 7 days free. Cancel anytime — no strings attached

smartphone-notification-section.copy-1: Not random. Not AI. Each whisper is written by hand, crafted by a poet who has spent years shaping emotions into short forms.
smartphone-notification-section.copy-2: They are like little love notes — small enough to fit in a single SMS, yet warm enough to brighten your evening.

testimonials.title: What our readers whisper back…
testimonials.copy: Every line here comes from someone who has already welcomed Evening Whisper into their life. Their words say more than we ever could.

testimonial-1.quote: These messages are little gems in my day. Sometimes a single sentence is enough to make me feel needed.
testimonial-1.author: Margaret

testimonial-2.quote: I open a text and suddenly the room feels brighter, even though the lights haven’t changed.
testimonial-2.author: Patricia

testimonial-3.quote: “Evening Whisper” is a daily letter from life — tender, light, essential.
testimonial-3.author: Eleanor

testimonial-4.quote: Every evening with “Evening Whisper” feels warmer. These short verses remind me that the heart can still tremble.
testimonial-4.author: Amelia

testimonial-5.quote: Thanks to them I feel once again like a young girl waiting for a letter from her beloved.
testimonial-5.author: Catherine

testimonial-6.quote: Your whispers are like a cup of tea by the fire — brief, but just right for the soul.
testimonial-6.author: Dorothy

testimonial-7.quote: These little texts, in just a few words, can awaken memories I haven’t visited in years.
testimonial-7.author: Anne

testimonial-8.quote: I never knew a text message could be like a touch — gentle, warm, soothing.
testimonial-8.author: Emily

pricing-section.title: A moment of warmth and kind words

bottom-cta.title: Ready for your first whisper?
bottom-cta.subtitle: Join thousands of readers who receive warm words every evening

Welcome.paragraph-1-trial: We are grateful for your trust and for starting your trial with Evening Whisper.
Welcome.paragraph-1-one-time: We are grateful for your trust and for beginning your 30-day one-off subscription with Evening Whisper.
Welcome.paragraph-1-monthly: We are grateful for your trust and for starting your subscription with Evening Whisper.
Welcome.paragraph-2-trial: From today, every evening at 20:59 for the next 7 days, you will receive a message to warm your heart and bring you a moment of peace.
Welcome.paragraph-2-one-time: From today, every evening at 20:59 for the next 30 days, you will receive a message to warm your heart and bring you a moment of peace.
Welcome.paragraph-2-monthly: From today, every evening at 20:59, you will receive a message to warm your heart and bring you a moment of peace.
